final:
module top_module(
     input  [7:0] in0,
     input  [7:0] in1,
     output wire [7:0] out0,
     output wire [7:0] out1
);assign out0 = (in0<in1) ? in0:in1;
     assign out1 = (in0<in1) ? in1:in0;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out0 <= in1; out1 <= in0;
    end
  end

endmodule
